description: Privacy Policy + Terms & Conditions + Registration Request CPT + Record ID Generation System

tasks.title: Privacy Policy Page
tasks.notes: Draft completed Feb 28, 2026. Updated with HireAccord branding Mar 1, 2026. Deployed to local (page ID 3). GDPR-compliant policy covering data controller, legal basis, processing purpose, international transfers, retention (24 months), data subject rights, security measures. Awaiting lawyer review (LFTC-002).

tasks.title: Terms & Conditions Page
tasks.notes: Draft completed Feb 28, 2026. Updated with HireAccord branding Mar 1, 2026. Deployed to local (page ID 60). Covers company information, scope of services, employer/candidate obligations, fees & payment, confidentiality, liability limitations, governing law, amendments. Awaiting lawyer review (LFTC-002).

tasks.title: CPT td_registration_request
tasks.notes: Custom post type for registration requests. Stores all submission data before approval. Links to td_user_requests table via request_id. Foundation for registration approval workflow.

tasks.title: Record ID Generation System
tasks.notes: Generate Request IDs (USRQ-YYMMDD-NNNN) for submissions and Record IDs (PRSN-YYMMDD-NNNN, CMPY-YYMMDD-NNNN) for approved entities. Enforces one-to-one-to-one mapping (1 Email = 1 WP User = 1 Record ID = 1 Role).

deploymentSteps.command: git checkout main && git merge develop --no-edit && git push origin main

deploymentSteps.notes: NEW in v3.6.4: Mandatory verification to detect deployment failures

deploymentSteps.command: scp SQL files to production, import via phpMyAdmin or wp-cli
deploymentSteps.notes: Apply PENG-015 SQL migration for td_registration_request CPT

deploymentSteps.description: Deploy Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions pages
deploymentSteps.command: Manual page deployment via restore-page-X.php script
deploymentSteps.notes: Deploy both pages using POST-DEPLOYMENT-CHECKLIST.md workflow. Privacy Policy (page 3), Terms & Conditions (page 60)

deploymentSteps.command: ssh production 'cd public_html && wp cache flush --allow-root'
User tests Privacy Policy page, Record ID generation, CPT creation

verificationChecklist: Privacy Policy page exists and displays correctly (/privacy-policy/)
Terms & Conditions page exists and displays correctly (/terms-conditions/)
All Privacy Policy sections present: data controller, legal basis, processing purpose, retention, data subject rights, security
All Terms & Conditions sections present: services, user obligations, fees, liability, governing law
Registration form links to both pages work correctly
Record ID generation works for test submissions
One-to-one-to-one mapping enforced (1 Email = 1 WP User = 1 Record ID)

affectedPages.notes: Comprehensive GDPR-compliant privacy policy. Updated with HireAccord branding Mar 1, 2026. Awaiting lawyer review.
New legal page covering service terms. Updated with HireAccord branding Mar 1, 2026. Awaiting lawyer review.
